baseline.observed: returned 10 prompts because preview_limit became None

observed_weaknesses: Invalid numeric scan options were silently ignored.
Invalid preview limits could return a larger preview than intended.
Invalid repair count silently used the default batch size.

selected_candidate.name: strict numeric CLI options
selected_candidate.reason: Agent automation should fail closed when numeric caps are malformed.
selected_candidate.success_metric: Invalid --limit, --preview-limit, and --count exit non-zero; valid numeric scan still exits 0.

safety_controls: Valid numeric scan behavior was smoke-tested.
The change is limited to CLI parsing.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
